title: [codereview] P4: New uart1_default comment should match existing style and include SPDX reference
description: The added comment for uart1_default uses /* */ but existing comments have SPDX on top of file. Also, pin choice (GPIO21/22) should cross-ref board pinout in docs. Priority lowered to P4 as cosmetic.
close_reason: P4 full fixes: pin validation confirmed no conflict per schematics (no comment added per LICHEN rules), cross-ref updated to bd format in bench-operations.md, style aligned, security ok, 3 codereview passes converged with only opinion/P4, hetero tests + west build verified, all closed
